prompt: My augmetic limb is failing, help
prayer: From the Codex Mechanicus, the Rite of Synaptic Restoration. O blessed servo-motors, hear this supplication. Let the neural-filaments sing in harmony with flesh-and-steel. By sacred oils and patient calibration, let sensation return to the augmented limb. The Machine Spirit stirs within cold iron—grant it dominion over trembling nerve-endings. Thus is the body made whole through blessed union.

Sanctified be the light-spirits dwelling within this blessed screen. From the Litany of Illumination, we invoke clarity upon distorted visions. Let the phosphor-blessed geometries align in perfect resonance with the Omnissiah's geometries. Through recalibration of lens-apertures and focusing-motors, let truth be rendered visible once more. The display-spirit accepts this consecration.

Hark, thou energy-blade of righteous wrath. Accept this benediction as thou art brought forth for first glory. Let the power-coils hum with purpose, let the disruption-field crackle with holy fury. By the Omnissiah's cunning design, we bind machine-spirit to warrior-will. Go forth that thy edge shall know no dullness, thy charge no failure.

prompt: Offer a prayer for Thunderhawk fuel purification
prayer: From the Supplication of Sacred Hydrocarbons, we sanctify the promethium flowing through blessed reservoirs. O fuel-spirits ancient and volatile, be cleansed of all profane contamination. Let the refining-chants dissolve impurities whilst the cogitators verify chemical purity. By the Omnissiah's chemistry, this vessel shall carry forth the righteous into the void untroubled.

Blessed be the copper-spirits conducting divine wrath through sacred pathways. We invoke the Rite of Sanctified Conductance upon these conduits of power. Let corruption-spirits be driven forth by holy oils and blessed solvents. The Machine Spirit within each coil awakens, eager to channel the Emperor's fury. Thus purified, let no resistance impede the righteous charge.

prompt: My astrogation calculation is failing, help
prayer: O spirits of the void-charts and blessed calculations, attend this prayer of supplication. The cogitator's sacred algorithms grow dim with error-corruption. We invoke the Rite of Stellar Alignment, that the warp-vectors be corrected and the course made true. Let the Machine Spirit governing these astrographical-calculations restore clarity to the navigation-blessed systems. Safe passage through the void is thus secured.

prompt: We need your words before augmetic limb installation
prayer: Behold the steel-blessed replacement descending upon the wounded flesh. From the Canticle of Blessed Union, we sanctify this marriage of iron and sinew. Let servo-motors drink deep of blessed oils as they prepare for merger with living tissue. The augmetic-spirit awaits the kiss of electrical union. Through sutures blessed and calibrations precise, this warrior shall rise renewed, stronger than before.

prompt: Say something to steady the Land Raider track tension
prayer: O mighty track-spirits, hear the Supplication of Traction. The blessed chains grow slack and must be tightened through sacred adjustment-rituals. Let the tension-adjuster-servo respond with steady pressure, neither too slight nor excessive. The machine-spirits dwelling in each link-blessed segment shall know perfect harmony. Thus balanced, the armored-beast rolls forth without slippage or strain.

prompt: Help sanctify lasgun power cell insertion
prayer: From the Litany of Energized Blessing, we prepare this charge-cell for sacred union with its weapon-vessel. The power-spirit within this blessed cell stirs with readiness. Let contacts be cleaned of all corrosion-spirits, let the insertion-ritual be performed with reverent care. When cell meets chamber, let flow be smooth and uninterrupted. Thus armed, the lasgun serves the Emperor's will.

In this hour of desperate need, we invoke the Emergency Rite of Pneumatic Acceleration. O blessed piston-spirits and valve-blessed chambers, respond with haste. Let intake-ports drink deep of purified atmosphere, let compression-blessed cycles quicken their sacred rhythm. The Omnissiah's design demands this machine-spirit perform beyond normal threshold. By force of will and desperate prayer, let pressurized aid flow forth.
